subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the glad-tidings of God! Place thy hope in the bounty of the Sovereign of existence, Who encompasseth all the worlds of the seen and the unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر ببشارات الله از فضل سلطان وجود که محیط عوالم غیب و شهود است امید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @imagery in the Qur'an, @love of God
